__comment: Web search configuration. Seeded automatically on first install — add API keys via /mixdog:config or by editing this file in the data directory.

rawSearch.__comment: Provider priority list — first provider with a valid key is tried first, then falls back in order.

credentials.__comment: Leave apiKey as empty string to disable a provider.

crawl.__comment: URL scraping limits applied when fetching page content.

siteRules.__comment: Per-domain overrides — force a specific search/scrape backend for a given hostname.
